caption: In the video, a woman is giving a presentation in front of an audience. She is standing to the left side of the frame, holding a tablet and appears to be explaining something related to note-taking applications, as indicated by the projected screens behind her. The screens display two different interfaces of a notes app, one with a more traditional, paper-like design and the other with a simpler, modern interface. The text "I love writing notes" is visible on both screens, suggesting a comparison between the two designs. A man wearing a green beanie is seated in the foreground, listening attentively. The setting seems to be a professional or educational environment, possibly a conference or seminar room. The woman gestures occasionally while speaking, engaging with her audience.
